subcodes.first_line: O God, Possessor of all names and Fashioner of all things! I beseech Thee by Thineall-embracing mercy and all-encompassing compassion
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا مالک الاسماء وخالق الاشیاء اسالک برحمتک الواسعة وعنایتک المحیطة
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
